title: eriogonum spathulatum var. brandegeei
intro: Eriogonum spathulatum var. brandegeei, also known as Brandegee's buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a variety of the Eriogonum spathulatum plant, which is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Eriogonum spathulatum var. brandegeei include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Eriogonum spathulatum var. brandegeei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
